lists.name: Demo List
lists.description: Demo list for local StackPage testing

children.content: {"name":"PageStateBridge","props":{"title":"Page State Bridge","description":"Inspect and update shared page state without direct component coupling.","stateKey":"keyword"}}
{"name":"Text","props":{"title":"Datasource Title","content":"","__bindings":{"content":{"sourceId":"demo-static","path":"$.title"}}}}
{"name":"CardList","props":{"items":[],"__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"demo-static","path":"$.items","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}}}}

children.name: PageStateBridge
children.content: {"name":"PageStateBridge","props":{"title":"Page State Bridge","description":"Inspect and update shared page state without direct component coupling.","stateKey":"keyword"}}

{"name":"ContactFormResultText","props":{"title":"Shared State Result Viewer","ackMessagePrefix":"Demo completed","emptyText":"No demo result yet.","pageStateKey":"selectedId","subscriptions":[{"id":"sub-demo-1","event":"demo:bridge.rules:after","enabled":true,"replyMode":"none"}],"actions":[{"id":"result-action-1","label":"Mirror Page State","mode":"emit","event":"demo:result.rules","enabled":true}],"__interactions":[{"id":"result-rule-1","event":"demo:result.rules","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"demo.result.last","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true},{"id":"result-rule-2","event":"demo:result.rules","action":"set-prop","targetWidgetId":"$self","targetPath":"ruleLog","valueFrom":"$.at","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"ContactFormBridge","props":{"title":"Event Bridge Sender","successText":"Emitted event successfully","waitingText":"Waiting for response","ruleEcho":"demo-rules","actions":[{"id":"bridge-action-1","label":"Send (Emit)","mode":"emit","event":"contact:submit","enabled":true},{"id":"bridge-action-2","label":"Send (Request)","mode":"request","event":"contact:submit:request","responseEvent":"contact:submit:request:completed","enabled":true},{"id":"bridge-action-3","label":"Demo State Event","mode":"emit","event":"demo:bridge.rules","enabled":true}],"__interactions":[{"id":"bridge-rule-1","event":"demo:bridge.rules","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"demo.bridge.lastEmail","valueFrom":"$.email","enabled":true},{"id":"bridge-rule-2","event":"demo:bridge.rules","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:bridge.rules:after","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true},{"id":"bridge-rule-3","event":"demo:bridge.rules:after","action":"set-prop","targetWidgetId":"$self","targetPath":"title","valueFrom":"$.name","enabled":true},{"id":"bridge-rule-4","event":"demo:bridge.rules","action":"set-prop","targetWidgetId":"$self","targetPath":"ruleEcho","valueFrom":"$.message","enabled":true}]}}

lists.name: Demo Event List
lists.description: Posts used by the event pattern demo

items.title: Building a calm page builder
items.excerpt: Keep events local and shared state small.
items.body: Widgets emit simple events. Page state carries only what multiple widgets need to share.

items.title: Designing searchable content
items.excerpt: Search bars should update a shared keyword, not mutate results directly.
items.body: The search UI updates page state and the result panel derives the list from the same source.

items.title: Form submission with confirmation
items.excerpt: Ask first, send second, then show the receiver response.
items.body: The form uses request/response so the sender can show a result after the receiver processes the payload.

children.content: {"name":"DemoEventPatternGuide","props":{"title":"Event patterns","description":"Use these four core patterns as the starting point for new components."}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"1","title":"Select → Detail","description":"Click a card, then watch the detail panel update.","accent":"amber"}}

{"name":"DemoPostList","props":{"title":"Post list cards","description":"Click a card to set the selected id and show the detail panel.","selectedIdKey":"demo.post.selectedId","selectEvent":"demo:post:selected","eventKind":"select_detail","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"demo-posts","path":"$.items","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}},"__interactions":[{"id":"post-list-select-state","event":"select","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"demo.post.selectedId","valueFrom":"$.id","enabled":true},{"id":"post-list-select-event","event":"select","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:post:selected","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"DemoPostDetail","props":{"title":"Post detail","description":"This panel updates from the shared selected id.","selectedIdKey":"demo.post.selectedId","eventKind":"select_detail","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"demo-posts","path":"$.items","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}}}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"2","title":"Search → Results","description":"Type in the bar and let the result panel filter itself.","accent":"blue"}}

{"name":"DemoSearchBar","props":{"title":"Search bar","description":"Typing updates the shared keyword and refreshes the results panel.","keywordKey":"demo.search.keyword","searchEvent":"demo:search:changed","placeholder":"Search posts...","eventKind":"search_filter","__interactions":[{"id":"search-bar-state","event":"search","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"demo.search.keyword","valueFrom":"$.keyword","enabled":true},{"id":"search-bar-event","event":"search","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:search:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"DemoSearchResults","props":{"title":"Search results","description":"This list filters itself from the shared search keyword.","keywordKey":"demo.search.keyword","eventKind":"search_filter","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"demo-posts","path":"$.items","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}}}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"3","title":"Submit → Confirm","description":"Confirm before submit, then send the payload to the receiver.","accent":"emerald"}}

{"name":"DemoRegistrationForm","props":{"title":"Registration form","description":"Confirm before submit so the receiver can reply cleanly.","confirmText":"Send this registration?","submitEvent":"demo:registration:submit","responseEvent":"demo:registration:submit:completed","buttonLabel":"Review and submit","eventKind":"submit_confirm","__interactions":[{"id":"registration-submit-state","event":"submit","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"demo.registration.last","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true},{"id":"registration-submit-event","event":"submit","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:registration:submit","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"DemoRequestReceiver","props":{"title":"Registration receiver","description":"Listens for a request and sends a response back.","listenEvent":"demo:registration:submit","responseEvent":"demo:registration:submit:completed","replyPrefix":"Registration saved","eventKind":"submit_confirm"}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"4","title":"Request → Reply","description":"Press the button and watch the receiver answer back.","accent":"indigo"}}

{"name":"DemoRequestButton","props":{"title":"Request button","description":"Press to send a request and wait for the receiver reply.","buttonLabel":"Send request","requestEvent":"demo:button:request","responseEvent":"demo:button:request:completed","message":"Button clicked","eventKind":"request_bridge"}}

{"name":"DemoRequestReceiver","props":{"title":"Request receiver","description":"Listens for a request and sends a response back.","listenEvent":"demo:button:request","responseEvent":"demo:button:request:completed","replyPrefix":"Button request handled","eventKind":"request_bridge"}}

{"name":"FormControlSampler","props":{"title":"Form control sampler","description":"Use this widget to test typing, selection, toggles, colors, file input, and submission without page-state sync.","submitLabel":"Save draft"}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"1","title":"JSON Server → Datasource","description":"This fixture page loads a JSON datasource from the local json-server process.","accent":"indigo"}}
{"name":"Text","props":{"title":"Catalog title","content":"","__bindings":{"content":{"sourceId":"json-demo-catalog","path":"$.title"}}}}
{"name":"Text","props":{"title":"Catalog subtitle","content":"","__bindings":{"content":{"sourceId":"json-demo-catalog","path":"$.subtitle"}}}}
{"name":"Text","props":{"title":"Last updated","content":"","__bindings":{"content":{"sourceId":"json-demo-catalog","path":"$.updatedAt"}}}}
{"name":"CardList","props":{"items":[],"__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"json-demo-catalog","path":"$.items","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}}}}

{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"1","title":"Sales pipeline → opportunity desk","description":"A real-case CRM page combining opportunity data, workflow rules, and follow-up cards.","accent":"emerald"}}

{"name":"BusinessDealFilter","props":{"title":"Opportunity filters","description":"Filter the opportunity pipeline by stage or keyword, then watch the list and detail cards update.","stageKey":"sales.pipeline.stage","keywordKey":"sales.pipeline.keyword","filterEvent":"business:deal:filter","stages":["all","qualification","proposal","negotiation","closed won"],"__interactions":[{"id":"business-filter-stage","event":"filter","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.stage","valueFrom":"$.stage","enabled":true},{"id":"business-filter-keyword","event":"filter","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.keyword","valueFrom":"$.keyword","enabled":true},{"id":"business-filter-event","event":"filter","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:filter:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"StatsCard","props":{"title":"Open deals","value":"","change":"","description":"Open opportunities in the current pipeline","__bindings":{"value":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.kpis.openDeals"},"change":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.kpis.openDealsDelta"}}}}

{"name":"StatsCard","props":{"title":"Win rate","value":"","change":"","description":"Deals won this month","__bindings":{"value":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.kpis.winRate"},"change":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.kpis.winRateDelta"}}}}

{"name":"StatsCard","props":{"title":"At risk","value":"","change":"","description":"Deals needing follow-up","__bindings":{"value":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.kpis.atRisk"},"change":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.kpis.atRiskDelta"}}}}

{"name":"BusinessDealList","props":{"title":"Opportunity pipeline","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","selectEvent":"business:deal:selected","description":"Select an opportunity to update shared page state and notify the detail panel.","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.deals","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}},"__interactions":[{"id":"business-deal-select-state","event":"select","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","valueFrom":"$.id","enabled":true},{"id":"business-deal-select-event","event":"select","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:selected","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealStageAction","props":{"title":"Stage actions","description":"Advance the selected deal through qualification, proposal, negotiation, and closed won.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","workflowStageKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","stageChangedEvent":"business:deal:stage:changed","stages":["qualification","proposal","negotiation","closed won"],"__interactions":[{"id":"business-stage-advance-state","event":"advance-stage","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","valueFrom":"$.nextStage","enabled":true},{"id":"business-stage-advance-event","event":"advance-stage","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:stage:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealReviewAction","props":{"title":"Review step","description":"Approve, reject, or reopen the selected opportunity and keep the outcome visible.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","reviewEvent":"business:deal:review:changed","__interactions":[{"id":"business-review-approve-state","event":"review-deal","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","valueFrom":"$.nextStatus","enabled":true},{"id":"business-review-approve-event","event":"review-deal","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:review:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealOutcomeAction","props":{"title":"Outcome step","description":"Approve and publish, request changes, or assign a follow-up after review.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","outcomeEvent":"business:deal:outcome:changed","__interactions":[{"id":"business-outcome-state","event":"decide-outcome","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","valueFrom":"$.nextStatus","enabled":true},{"id":"business-outcome-event","event":"decide-outcome","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:outcome:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealDetail","props":{"title":"Opportunity detail","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","description":"This detail panel listens to the shared selected opportunity id.","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.deals","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}}}}

{"name":"ContactFormBridge","props":{"title":"Lead intake sender","successText":"Lead submission emitted","waitingText":"Waiting for qualification reply","ruleEcho":"business-lead-rules","actions":[{"id":"lead-action-1","label":"Send lead","mode":"emit","event":"business:lead:submit","enabled":true},{"id":"lead-action-2","label":"Qualify lead","mode":"request","event":"business:lead:qualify","responseEvent":"business:lead:qualify:completed","enabled":true}],"__interactions":[{"id":"lead-rule-status","event":"demo:bridge.rules","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.leadStatus","valueFrom":"$.status","enabled":true},{"id":"lead-rule-echo","event":"demo:bridge.rules","action":"set-prop","targetWidgetId":"$self","targetPath":"ruleEcho","valueFrom":"$.message","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"ContactFormResultText","props":{"title":"Lead intake receiver","ackMessagePrefix":"Lead reviewed","emptyText":"No lead has been processed yet.","pageStateKey":"sales.pipeline.leadStatus","subscriptions":[{"id":"lead-sub-1","event":"business:lead:submit","enabled":true,"replyMode":"none"},{"id":"lead-sub-2","event":"business:lead:qualify","enabled":true,"replyMode":"ack","responseEvent":"business:lead:qualify:completed","resultTemplate":"Lead qualified"}],"actions":[{"id":"lead-result-1","label":"Run lead rule","mode":"emit","event":"demo:bridge.rules","enabled":true}],"__interactions":[{"id":"lead-result-status","event":"demo:result.rules","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.leadStatus","valueFrom":"$.status","enabled":true},{"id":"lead-result-event","event":"demo:result.rules","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:result.rules:after","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"2","title":"Business chain scenario","description":"Select a deal, move it through stage, review, and outcome in one place.","accent":"indigo"}}

{"name":"BusinessChainProgressBar","props":{"title":"Chain progress","description":"Watch the workflow fill from selection to outcome.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","workflowStageKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus"}}

{"name":"BusinessChainStatusSummary","props":{"title":"Chain status summary","description":"Compact readout of the selected deal and its workflow state.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","workflowStageKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","leadStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.leadStatus"}}

{"name":"BusinessChainNextAction","props":{"title":"Next action","description":"A guided hint that tells the user what to do next in the business chain.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","workflowStageKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","leadStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.leadStatus"}}
{"name":"BusinessChainLegend","props":{"title":"Chain legend","description":"Color key for the business chain page so the workflow is easy to read."}}

{"name":"BusinessChainNavigator","props":{"title":"Business chain navigator","description":"Watch the active step update as the deal moves through selection, stage, review, and outcome.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","workflowStageKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus"}}

{"name":"BusinessChainGuide","props":{"title":"Business chain guide","description":"Follow the deal from selection to outcome using the same shared page state through every step.","steps":[{"label":"1. Select","summary":"Pick a deal so the workflow starts from the same target."},{"label":"2. Stage","summary":"Advance the deal through qualification, proposal, negotiation, or closed won."},{"label":"3. Review","summary":"Approve, reject, or reopen the deal after the stage change."},{"label":"4. Outcome","summary":"Publish, request changes, or assign a follow-up and watch the receiver log the event."}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealList","props":{"title":"Selected deal lane","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","stageKey":"sales.pipeline.stage","keywordKey":"sales.pipeline.keyword","selectEvent":"business:deal:selected","description":"This list is prefiltered to a single deal so the full chain is easy to test.","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.deals","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}},"__interactions":[{"id":"chain-deal-select-state","event":"select","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","valueFrom":"$.id","enabled":true},{"id":"chain-deal-select-event","event":"select","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:selected","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealDetail","props":{"title":"Chain detail","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","stageKey":"sales.pipeline.stage","keywordKey":"sales.pipeline.keyword","description":"Watch stage, review, and outcome status update as the flow progresses.","__bindings":{"items":{"sourceId":"crm-business-demo","path":"$.deals","targetType":"array","selector":{"type":"all"}}}}}

{"name":"BusinessDealStageAction","props":{"title":"Stage step","description":"Advance the selected deal from proposal toward negotiation or closed won.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","workflowStageKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","stageChangedEvent":"business:deal:stage:changed","stages":["qualification","proposal","negotiation","closed won"],"__interactions":[{"id":"chain-stage-state","event":"advance-stage","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.selectedStage","valueFrom":"$.nextStage","enabled":true},{"id":"chain-stage-event","event":"advance-stage","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:stage:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealReviewAction","props":{"title":"Review step","description":"Approve, reject, or reopen the selected deal after the stage is set.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","reviewEvent":"business:deal:review:changed","__interactions":[{"id":"chain-review-state","event":"review-deal","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","valueFrom":"$.nextStatus","enabled":true},{"id":"chain-review-event","event":"review-deal","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:review:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealOutcomeAction","props":{"title":"Outcome step","description":"Approve and publish, request changes, or assign follow-up after review.","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","reviewStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.reviewStatus","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","outcomeEvent":"business:deal:outcome:changed","__interactions":[{"id":"chain-outcome-state","event":"decide-outcome","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","valueFrom":"$.nextStatus","enabled":true},{"id":"chain-outcome-event","event":"decide-outcome","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"business:deal:outcome:changed","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"BusinessDealOutcomeReceiver","props":{"title":"Outcome receiver","description":"Review and outcome events appear here as a compact audit trail.","listenEvent":"business:deal:outcome:changed","reviewEvent":"business:deal:review:changed","selectedIdKey":"sales.pipeline.selectedId","outcomeStatusKey":"sales.pipeline.outcomeStatus","maxEntries":6}}
{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"3","title":"Lifecycle events","description":"A runtime page that exposes page bootstrap and widget mount/unmount events.","accent":"violet"}}

{"name":"LifecycleEventDashboard","props":{"title":"Page + widget lifecycle dashboard","description":"Watch page:init, page:load, page:ready, widget:init, widget:load, and widget:unmount events while the page runtime mounts widgets.","watchWidgetId":"widget-lifecycle-dashboard","maxEntries":12}}

{"name":"DemoFlowSection","props":{"index":"4","title":"Content review → selection queue","description":"A one-level accordion queue where clicking a row updates the receiver snapshot through shared state and a follow-up event.","accent":"amber"}}

{"name":"DemoPostFoldSummary","props":{"title":"Review snapshot","description":"A quick page-side guide that shows the current article selection before the receiver panel updates.","selectedIdKey":"content.review.selectedId","selectedTitleKey":"content.review.selectedTitle","items":[{"id":"post-1","title":"Building a calm page builder","excerpt":"Keep events local and shared state small.","body":"Widgets emit simple events. Page state carries only what multiple widgets need to share.","category":"Architecture"},{"id":"post-2","title":"Designing searchable content","excerpt":"Search bars should update a shared keyword, not mutate results directly.","body":"The search UI updates page state and the result panel derives the list from the same source.","category":"Search"},{"id":"post-3","title":"Form submission with confirmation","excerpt":"Ask first, send second, then show the receiver response.","body":"The form uses request/response so the sender can show a result after the receiver processes the payload.","category":"Form"}]}}

{"name":"DemoPostFoldTips","props":{"title":"Review tips","description":"This helper card keeps the review queue readable as a runnable sample.","steps":["Pick a post from the accordion.","Watch the summary refresh immediately.","Check the receiver history trail and latest detail."]}}

{"name":"DemoPostFoldNavigator","props":{"title":"Review queue navigator","description":"Accordion rows emit fold-select and update the shared receiver snapshot.","selectedIdKey":"content.review.selectedId","selectEvent":"demo:fold:post:selected","items":[{"id":"post-1","title":"Building a calm page builder","excerpt":"Keep events local and shared state small.","body":"Widgets emit simple events. Page state carries only what multiple widgets need to share.","category":"Architecture"},{"id":"post-2","title":"Designing searchable content","excerpt":"Search bars should update a shared keyword, not mutate results directly.","body":"The search UI updates page state and the result panel derives the list from the same source.","category":"Search"},{"id":"post-3","title":"Form submission with confirmation","excerpt":"Ask first, send second, then show the receiver response.","body":"The form uses request/response so the sender can show a result after the receiver processes the payload.","category":"Form"}],"__interactions":[{"id":"fold-navigator-select-state","event":"fold-select","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"content.review.selectedId","valueFrom":"$.id","enabled":true},{"id":"fold-navigator-select-title","event":"fold-select","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"content.review.selectedTitle","valueFrom":"$.title","enabled":true},{"id":"fold-navigator-select-event","event":"fold-select","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:fold:post:selected","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

{"name":"DemoPostFoldReceiver","props":{"title":"Content snapshot","description":"Business-style receiver card showing the current selection, identity, and recent history trail.","selectedIdKey":"content.review.selectedId","items":[{"id":"post-1","title":"Building a calm page builder","excerpt":"Keep events local and shared state small.","body":"Widgets emit simple events. Page state carries only what multiple widgets need to share.","category":"Architecture"},{"id":"post-2","title":"Designing searchable content","excerpt":"Search bars should update a shared keyword, not mutate results directly.","body":"The search UI updates page state and the result panel derives the list from the same source.","category":"Search"},{"id":"post-3","title":"Form submission with confirmation","excerpt":"Ask first, send second, then show the receiver response.","body":"The form uses request/response so the sender can show a result after the receiver processes the payload.","category":"Form"}]}}

{"name": "DemoFlowSection", "props": {"index": "6", "title": "Media + location showcase", "description": "Polished inquiry, media, slider, and map cards bound to a fixture datasource.", "accent": "rose"}}

{"name": "MediaInquiryCard", "props": {"title": "Inquiry form", "description": "Collect project requests with a calm, premium form layout.", "submitLabel": "Send inquiry", "followUpLabel": "We\u2019ll reply by email after review."}}

{"name": "MediaShowcaseGrid", "props": {"title": "Media cards", "description": "Cards for list, image, and video items that all jump to the detail page.", "items": [], "detailPageId": "page-media-detail-demo", "__bindings": {"items": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.items", "targetType": "array", "selector": {"type": "all"}}, "title": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.title"}, "description": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.subtitle"}}}}

{"name": "MediaSliderCard", "props": {"title": "Image slider", "description": "A horizontal strip of hero frames for quick scanning.", "slides": [], "detailPageId": "page-media-detail-demo", "__bindings": {"slides": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.sliderItems", "targetType": "array", "selector": {"type": "all"}}, "title": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.title"}, "description": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.subtitle"}}}}

{"name": "GoogleStreetViewCard", "props": {"title": "Street View", "subtitle": "Jump into the matching Google panoramic location.", "viewpoint": "35.6595,139.7005", "heading": 170, "pitch": 8, "fov": 75, "locationLabel": "Shibuya Crossing, Tokyo", "__bindings": {"title": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.title"}, "subtitle": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.subtitle"}, "viewpoint": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.viewpoint"}, "heading": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.heading"}, "pitch": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.pitch"}, "fov": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.fov"}, "locationLabel": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.streetview.locationLabel"}}}}

{"name": "GoogleMapCard", "props": {"title": "Map card", "subtitle": "Open a clean map link for the same place.", "center": "35.6595,139.7005", "zoom": 16, "locationLabel": "Shibuya, Tokyo", "__bindings": {"title": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.map.title"}, "subtitle": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.map.subtitle"}, "center": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.map.center"}, "zoom": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.map.zoom"}, "locationLabel": {"sourceId": "media-showcase-catalog", "path": "$.location.map.locationLabel"}}}}

{"name": "DemoFlowSection", "props": {"index": "7", "title": "Media detail page", "description": "Open a card with ?item=... to inspect a single media record and its location actions.", "accent": "blue"}}

{"name": "MediaDetailPanel", "props": {"title": "Media detail", "description": "This page focuses on one selected media item and the official map links behind it.", "items": [], "detailPageId": "page-media-detail-demo", "__bindings": {"items": {"sourceId": "media-detail-catalog", "path": "$.items", "targetType": "array", "selector": {"type": "all"}}, "title": {"sourceId": "media-detail-catalog", "path": "$.title"}, "description": {"sourceId": "media-detail-catalog", "path": "$.subtitle"}}}}

{"name": "DemoFlowSection", "props": {"index": "8", "title": "Real estate buy + rent showcase", "description": "Polished inquiry, buy/rent listing, slider, and map cards for property pages.", "accent": "rose"}}

{"name": "RealEstateInquiryCard", "props": {"title": "Property inquiry", "description": "Collect buy, rent, or sell requests in a calm premium form.", "submitLabel": "Send inquiry", "followUpLabel": "We will reply with matching listings and a showing plan."}}

children.content: {"name":"DemoSearchBar","props":{"title":"Search bar","keywordKey":"demo.search.keyword","searchEvent":"demo:search:changed","placeholder":"Search posts...","description":"Typing updates the shared keyword and refreshes the results panel.","eventKind":"search_filter","__interactions":[],"__schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"title":"Title","type":"string"},"keywordKey":{"title":"KeywordKey","type":"string"},"searchEvent":{"title":"SearchEvent","type":"string"},"placeholder":{"title":"Placeholder","type":"string"},"description":{"title":"Description","type":"string"},"eventKind":{"title":"EventKind","type":"string"}},"required":[]},"__bindings":{},"__schemaOptions":{},"__ignoredMappings":[]}}

children.name: DemoSearchResults
children.content: {"name":"DemoSearchResults","props":{"title":"Search results","items":[{"id":"post-1","title":"Building a calm page builder","excerpt":"Keep events local and shared state small.","body":"Widgets emit simple events. Page state carries only what multiple widgets need to share.","category":"Architecture"},{"id":"post-2","title":"Designing searchable content","excerpt":"Search bars should update a shared keyword, not mutate results directly.","body":"The search UI updates page state and the result panel derives the list from the same source.","category":"Search"},{"id":"post-3","title":"Form submission with confirmation","excerpt":"Ask first, send second, then show the receiver response.","body":"The form uses request/response so the sender can show a result after the receiver processes the payload.","category":"Form"}],"keywordKey":"demo.search.keyword","description":"This list filters itself from the shared search keyword.","eventKind":"search_filter","__schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"title":"Title","type":"string"},"items":{"title":"Items","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"title":"Id","type":"string"},"title":{"title":"Title","type":"string"},"excerpt":{"title":"Excerpt","type":"string"},"body":{"title":"Body","type":"string","format":"textarea"},"category":{"title":"Category","type":"string"}}},"x-array-binding":true},"keywordKey":{"title":"KeywordKey","type":"string"},"description":{"title":"Description","type":"string"},"eventKind":{"title":"EventKind","type":"string"}},"required":[]},"__bindings":{},"__schemaOptions":{},"__ignoredMappings":[],"__interactions":[]}}

Page state carries only what multiple widgets need to share.","category":"Architecture"},{"id":"post-2","title":"Designing searchable content","excerpt":"Search bars should update a shared keyword, not mutate results directly.","body":"The search UI updates page state and the result panel derives the list from the same source.","category":"Search"},{"id":"post-3","title":"Form submission with confirmation","excerpt":"Ask first, send second, then show the receiver response.","body":"The form uses request/response so the sender can show a result after the receiver processes the payload.","category":"Form"}],"selectedIdKey":"demo.post.selectedId","selectEvent":"demo:post:selected","description":"Click a card to set the selected id and show the detail panel.","eventKind":"select_detail","__interactions":[{"id":"post-list-select-state","event":"select","action":"set-shared-state","targetPath":"demo.post.selectedId","valueFrom":"$.id","enabled":true},{"id":"post-list-select-event","event":"select","action":"emit-event","targetPath":"demo:post:selected","valueFrom":"$","enabled":true}]}}

demoCatalogs.title: StackPage JSON Server datasource
demoCatalogs.subtitle: This page loads data from the local json-server fixture.

items.title: Beta
items.content: Used to verify API datasource bindings in the demo.

items.title: Gamma
items.content: Keeps the demo runnable as a manual integration test.

businessCatalogs.title: CRM ops dashboard
businessCatalogs.subtitle: Business fixtures for StackPage manual and automated tests.

deals.name: Acme Renewal
deals.summary: Renewal in progress with procurement and legal review.

deals.name: Northwind Expansion
deals.summary: Expansion proposal sent to finance and IT stakeholders.

deals.name: Globex Pilot
deals.summary: Pilot scope and success criteria are being validated.

mediaCatalogs.title: Media + location showcase
mediaCatalogs.subtitle: Inquiry, list/detail, slider, and map cards backed by json-server fixtures.

items.title: Launch story card
items.summary: A concise editorial card with a detail action for the content team.
items.body: Use this card when a list item needs to open into a richer detail page.

items.title: Campaign image card
items.summary: A crisp image tile with an explicit detail button and strong captioning.
items.body: Design the card to feel premium and still let the user jump to the detail page.

items.title: Trailer video card
items.summary: A one-unit video card with a detail route and a built-in action button.
items.body: Use the same layout language as image cards so the gallery feels coherent.

items.title: Portrait detail card
items.summary: A second image card so the slider and gallery have visual rhythm.
items.body: Cards should stay clean and balanced even when the content source changes.

sliderItems.title: Campaign image card
sliderItems.summary: A crisp image tile with an explicit detail button and strong captioning.
sliderItems.body: Design the card to feel premium and still let the user jump to the detail page.

sliderItems.title: Trailer video card
sliderItems.summary: A one-unit video card with a detail route and a built-in action button.
sliderItems.body: Use the same layout language as image cards so the gallery feels coherent.

sliderItems.title: Portrait detail card
sliderItems.summary: A second image card so the slider and gallery have visual rhythm.
sliderItems.body: Cards should stay clean and balanced even when the content source changes.

streetview.title: Street view snapshot
streetview.subtitle: A postcard-style street view card that opens Google Maps panoramic view.

map.title: Map snapshot
map.subtitle: A clean map card that launches Google Maps map view with the same location.

realEstateCatalogs.title: Japan property sale and rent showcase
realEstateCatalogs.subtitle: Premium listings, inquiry capture, and location cards for buy and rent flows.

properties.title: Shibuya Residence
properties.summary: Premium condominium with city access, concierge service, and a calm interior.
properties.body: Best for buyers who want a polished urban home close to transit, dining, and office access.

properties.title: Nakameguro Loft
properties.summary: Bright rental loft with a strong work-from-home layout and river access.
properties.body: A rental option for teams or singles who want design, light, and a walkable neighborhood.

properties.title: Daikanyama Maisonette
properties.summary: A quiet maisonette with video-tour style presentation and boutique interiors.
properties.body: Ideal for buyers seeking a residential feel with a premium neighborhood address.

properties.title: Yokohama Family House
properties.summary: Spacious rental home with parking, storage, and a practical floor plan.
properties.body: A rental home for families who want room to grow without losing location convenience.

sliderItems.summary: Premium condominium with city access, concierge service, and a calm interior.
sliderItems.body: Best for buyers who want a polished urban home close to transit, dining, and office access.
